vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

verify.value: All required fields are present and correctly formatted.
verify.rule: Ensure all required fields are present and correctly formatted.

verify.value: Estimated mass (200g) is within acceptable range.
verify.rule: Ensure the estimated mass is within the acceptable range.

verify.value: All critical features (base_plate, mounting_hole_pattern, cable_entry_grommet, motor_shaft_housing, motor_heatsink, motor_connector, sensor_pocket, leveling_adjustment, inspection_window) are represented in the geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Ensure all critical features are represented in the geometry_ops.

verify.value: All interfaces (motor_shaft_housing, mounting_hole_pattern, cable_entry_grommet) match adjacent module requirements.
verify.rule: Ensure all interfaces match adjacent module requirements.

verify.value: All fastener patterns (mounting_hole_pattern) include locking method (bolted) and torque/preload intent.
verify.rule: Ensure all fastener patterns include locking method and torque/preload intent.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress on motor_heatsink due to high heat flux (1000 W/m2).
risk.mit: Implement additional cooling measures or redesign heatsink for better thermal dissipation.

risk.desc: Cable harness routing may be compromised if strain relief is not properly implemented.
risk.mit: Ensure all cable exits have strain relief geometry and routing respects minimum bend radius.

risk.desc: Leveling adjustment feature may not provide sufficient adjustability for all environments.
risk.mit: Review and adjust leveling adjustment feature to ensure adequate adjustability.

risk.desc: Inspection window may be obstructed by surrounding features, hindering visual inspection.
risk.mit: Reposition or redesign inspection window for unobstructed visual access.

risk.desc: Motor shaft housing may not provide adequate clearance for press fit connection.
risk.mit: Review and adjust motor shaft housing dimensions to ensure proper clearance.

manufacturing_strategy.support: orientation: horizontal, inspection: visual, touch probe

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to high heat dissipation.

risk.desc: Risk of cable strain due to tight routing.

risk.mit: Conduct stress analysis and select appropriate harmonic drive.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment due to manufacturing tolerances.
risk.mit: Implement precision machining and use IT6 tolerance for critical features.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient bearing preload.
risk.mit: Ensure proper preload intent and torque application during assembly.
